mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.member_id, c.review_id, COALESCE(c.parent_id, 0) AS parent_id, c.comment_content, c.comment_delete_status, c.comment_created_at, c.comment_updated_at, m.member_name AS memberName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_id = c.comment_id) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl2 WHERE cl2.comment_id = c.comment_id AND cl2.member_id = #{memberId}) > 0 AS likedByMe FROM comment c JOIN member m ON m.member_id = c.member_id WHERE c.review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY c.comment_created_at ASC

SELECT comment_id, member_id, review_id, COALESCE(parent_id, 0) AS parent_id, comment_content, comment_delete_status, comment_created_at, comment_updated_at FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (member_id, review_id, parent_id, comment_content) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{reviewId}, NULLIF(#{parentId}, 0), #{commentContent})
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET comment_content = #{commentContent}, comment_updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
